recommendations.title: Earwig and the Witch
recommendations.overview: A headstrong orphan discovers a world of spells and potions while living with a selfish witch.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Puss in Book: Trapped in an Epic Tale
recommendations.overview: After tumbling into a magic storybook, Puss in Boots must fight, dance and romance his way through wild adventures as he searches for an escape.

recommendations.title: The Legend of Mor'du
recommendations.overview: The witch from Pixar's Brave uses magical illustrations to tell the legend of a power-obsessed prince who sought a magic spell that would allow him to wrest control of a kingdom from his brothers, only to destroy that kingdom and his own fate as well

recommendations.title: Castle in the Sky
recommendations.overview: A young boy and a girl with a magic crystal must race against pirates and foreign agents in a search for a legendary floating castle.

recommendations.title: Little Witch Academia
recommendations.overview: Inspired by a magician named Shiny Chariot, the lively Akko Kagari enters the Little Witch Academy with the dream of one day becoming as cool as her idol.

recommendations.title: Daddy, I'm a Zombie
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of a teenager girl in her new life as zombie.

recommendations.title: Inazuma Eleven the Movie: The Ultimate Force, Team Ogre, Attacks!
recommendations.overview: An organization in the future sends the specially trained Team Ogre to defeat Endou Mamoru and his team, to prevent him from influencing the world with his soccer.

recommendations.title: The Love Witch
recommendations.overview: A modern-day witch uses spells and magic to get men to fall in love with her, with deadly consequences.
